text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold City has managed to leave quite a mark on
the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Together, we've successfully navigated the crucial
first three years of her career.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
choice_data_list: Do you want to push back our starting time?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I want to run as much as possible.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
There are higher heights to reach, and I've got to
show you them all.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Oh, look at that, I'm feeling more awake now.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
choice_data_list:
I think it goes to show how much you love
running.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: All right, let's start with a warm-up. Here I go.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold City takes off running. Bathed in the
sunlight, she breaks into a smile. Today, like so
many days before...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's a beautiful sight to behold.
